questions.question: Which technology will give selective access to the network based upon authentication?

incorrect.explanation: **802.1Q** does not answer which in this stem. .
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "802.1Q" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: **ACLs** reflects a common trap: ACLs encrypt or deeply inspect traffic. ACLs filter by header fields (IP/protocol/port); they are not encryption or stateful firewalls.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: ACLs encrypt or deeply inspect traffic

incorrect.explanation: **Firewall** is the wrong device role here. Firewalls filter/policy traffic — they are not the default answer for basic L2 forwarding or VLAN trunk setup unless the stem is security-focused.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Defaulting to firewall when the stem tests switching or routing mechanics

answerReview.examTip: On the exam: Forgetting the implicit deny — An ACL with only permits blocks everything else via the implicit deny any

questions.question: You configured the AAA authentication for login to default local but forgot to create a local AAA user. What will happen when you log out?
